## Slides: Source links for updating and further reading

These are useful links to verify details, sequencing chemistries and software change quickly.

- EMBO Practical Course – Pangenomics: https://meetings.embo.org/event/26-pangenomics
- EASIGEN course summary: https://easigen.eu/events/embocourse_pangenomics
- Illumina sequencing-by-synthesis technology: https://www.illumina.com/science/technology/next-generation-sequencing/sequencing-technology.html
- Ultima Genomics sequencing technology and workflows: https://www.ultimagenomics.com/
- Original Hi-C method: https://doi.org/10.1126/science.1181369
- PacBio HiFi sequencing: https://www.pacb.com/technology/hifi-sequencing/
- Oxford Nanopore data analysis and basecalling: https://nanoporetech.com/document/data-analysis
- Oxford Nanopore basecalling overview: https://nanoporetech.com/es/platform/technology/basecalling
- GA4GH / SAMtools HTS specifications: https://samtools.github.io/hts-specs/
- 1000 Genomes / IGSR data file formats: https://www.internationalgenome.org/formats/
- GFA format specification: https://gfa-spec.github.io/GFA-spec/GFA1.html
- PGGB quick start and pangenome graph framing: https://pggb.readthedocs.io/en/latest/rst/quick_start.html
